code:
import io
import string

fn bars(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut c0 = 0
mut c1 = 0
mut c2 = 0
mut c3 = 0
mut c4 = 0
mut c5 = 0
mut c6 = 0
mut c7 = 0
mut c8 = 0
mut c9 = 0

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 48
      c0 = c0 + 1
    else if b == 49
      c1 = c1 + 1
    else if b == 50
      c2 = c2 + 1
    else if b == 51
      c3 = c3 + 1
    else if b == 52
      c4 = c4 + 1
    else if b == 53
      c5 = c5 + 1
    else if b == 54
      c6 = c6 + 1
    else if b == 55
      c7 = c7 + 1
    else if b == 56
      c8 = c8 + 1
    else if b == 57
      c9 = c9 + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("0: #{bars(c0)}")
print("1: #{bars(c1)}")
print("2: #{bars(c2)}")
print("3: #{bars(c3)}")
print("4: #{bars(c4)}")
print("5: #{bars(c5)}")
print("6: #{bars(c6)}")
print("7: #{bars(c7)}")
print("8: #{bars(c8)}")
print("9: #{bars(c9)}")
